_comment: First-party Quark compat (QUARKISLANDPLAN #71, Phase 1) — Quark stone types (limestone + jasper) through the rocky mining island, plus a rare deep blue-corundum geode; and myalite (Quark's End-flavoured stone) on the End form. Extras only, no dedicated seed. Inert without Quark (unknown ores are skipped before any RNG, so generation is byte-identical).

biome_overrides._comment: End form: myalite veins the end-stone island. Off the overworld home dim the base ores don't apply (useBase=false), so the End band must set its own ores; empty-biomes + dimension the_end selector-merges into rocky's base End band (which supplies the shape).
